bird.name: Mindanao boobook
bird.summary: The Mindanao boobook or Mindanao hawk-owl (Ninox spilocephala) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae that is endemic to the Philippin…

relations.subject: Mindanao boobook
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Mindanao boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining, conversion into farmlands and plantations and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
